creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The identifitication part of the submitted PR is based on the email 
sender. If the sender, on purpose or not, fakes the email address 
to an @freebsd.org address, then he will get assigned as owner of 
the PR. 

It is the same as somebody fakes the sender email address of that 
of the maintainer, or the maintainer sends it from a different 
address: GNATS has an email based unauthenticated submission system.
